creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
22:19.11 <ABataev> dim: -fopenmp=libgomp is just like you compile without -fopenmp
22:19.24 <dim> ABataev: aha.
22:21.13 <ABataev> dim: It works. Clang uses only libomp interface and does not rely on libgomp. -fopenmp=libgomp is used as a stub-like option
22:23.09 <ABataev> dim: Yes, if they want to use libgomp, they must use gcc
